Length Unit Converter

Convert between all common length units: meters, feet, inches, centimeters, kilometers, miles, yards.

FAQ

How many feet in a meter?

1 meter = 3.28084 feet. To convert meters to feet, multiply by 3.28084.

How many cm in an inch?

1 inch = 2.54 centimeters. To convert inches to cm, multiply by 2.54.
